invoice/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the modern release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
invoice/pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer JDKs and may cause warnings or errors; release is the standard way to set language level and bootstrap classpath.

invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata.

invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
invoice/src/main/java/com/jhipster/demo/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.

invoice/src/test/java/com/jhipster/demo/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
invoice/src/test/java/com/jhipster/demo/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or strict serialization checks).
